title: The Bihar and Uttar Pradesh (Alteration of Boundaries) Act, 1968
full_text: The Bihar and Uttar Pradesh (Alteration of Boundaries) Act, 1968 बिहार और उत्तर प्रदेश (सीमा-परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 1968 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196824 Act Number: 24 Enactment Date: 1968-05-22 Act Year: 1968 Short Title: The Bihar and Uttar Pradesh (Alteration of Boundaries) Act, 1968 Hindi Title: बिहार और उत्तर प्रदेश (सीमा-परिवर्तन) अधिनियम, 1968 Long Title: An Act to provide for the alteration of boundaries of the States of Bihar and Uttar Pradesh and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 10-06-1970 Notification: 10th June, 1970, vide notification No. G.S.R. 901, dated 9th June, 1970, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Bihar and Uttar Pradesh (Alteration of Boundaries) Act, 1968 PART I PRELIMINARY PART II TRANSFER OF TERRITORIES PART III REPRESENTATION IN THE LEGISLATURES PART IV HIGH COURTS PART V AUTHORISATION OF EXPENDITURE PART VI APPORTIONMENT OF ASSETS AND LIABILITIES PART VII LEGAL AND MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Transfer of territories. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Amendment of First Schedule to the Constitution. Section 5. Construction of Delimitation Orders. Section 6. Provision as to sitting members. Section 7. Extension of jurisdiction of, and transfer of proceedings to, High Court at Patna. Section 8. Extension of jurisdiction of, and transfer of proceedings to, High Court at Allahabad. Section 9. Right to appear in any proceedings transferred under section 7 or section 8. Section 10. Interpretation. Section 11. Appropriation of moneys for expenditure in transferred territories under existing appropriation Acts. Section 12. Reports relating to accounts of Bihar and Uttar Pradesh. Section 13. Land and goods. Section 14. Arrears of taxes. Section 15. Right to recover loans and advances. Section 16. Refund of taxes collected in excess. Section 17. Deposits. Section 18. Contracts. Section 19. Liability in respect of actionable wrong. Section 20. Liability as guarantor of co-operative societies. Section 21. Items in suspense. Section 22. Apportionment of assets or liabilities by agreement. Section 23. Power of Central Government to order allocation or adjustment in certain cases. Section 24. Expenditure to be charged on the Consolidated Fund. Section 25. State Financial Corporations and State Electricity Boards. Section 26. Territorial extent of laws. Section 27. Power to adapt laws. Section 28. Power to construe laws. Section 29. Legal proceedings. Section 30. Transfer of pending proceedings. Section 31. Right of pleaders to practise in certain courts. Section 32. Construction of boundary pillars, etc. Show Related Subordinates Section 33. Validity of demarcation done before commencement of Act. Section 34. Effect of provisions inconsistent with other laws. Section 35. Power to remove difficulties. Section 36. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Schedule 1.
